THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONTRERAS, FRANCISCO LABRADO, CECILIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 84 ONONDAGA AVE, #5 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94112 $1,716.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,716.00, STAYED UNTIL MAR-03-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFTS VACATE BY 3-3-95, 5PM & RETURN KEYS TO PLT, THEN BACK RENTAL DAMAGES WILL BE WAIVED, NO FURTHER STAY.
